MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ramesh Shrestha, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Hotel Sunrise LLC
David Gerard Mendez, Esq. for plaintiff

John Burdette, defendant
Tyler Macmillan, Esq. by limited scope appearance for defendant

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 447 Valencia Street, #208, San Francisco, CA 94103.

Trial date is vacated.
